Renewal before expiry

File before public disclosure; claim Paris Convention priority within 12 months of first foreign filing
Monthly monitoring cycle; monitoring report due by end of each calendar month

Before start of financial year
As per notice (usually 7–15 days from date of notice)

Within 30 days of cancellation order
Within 3 months of cancellation/surrender

Before each foreign remittance; file Form 15CA/15CB prior to executing bank transaction
Apply within 30 days of first TDS/TCS deduction obligation arising (Form 49B)

standard_due_rule: Q1 by 31 July; Q2 by 31 October; Q3 by 31 January; Q4 by 31 May of the following year
As per notice (usually 15–30 days from date of notice; extensions possible via ITBA portal)
Within 2 years from end of relevant assessment year (ITR-U under Section 139(8A))

31 July of assessment year (capital gains, NRI, multiple house properties, no business income)
31 October of assessment year (business or profession income; tax audit required u/s 44AB)

Form 11 (Annual Return): 30 May; Form 8 (Statement of Accounts): 30 October of each financial year
MGT-7A: within 60 days of close of FY (by 29 May); AOC-4: within 180 days of close of FY (by 27 September)
File INC-24 within 60 days of passing special resolution for name change
File INC-22 within 30 days of change of registered office (inter-state change requires NCLT approval)
30 September annually (DIR-3 KYC mandatory for all directors holding active DIN)
File DIR-3 KYC immediately upon deactivation; no fixed statutory window but delay attracts ₹5,000 fee
File DIR-12 within 30 days of appointment or change of director
File DIR-12 within 30 days of cessation or removal of director
30 September annually (DIR-3 KYC filing for all directors with active DIN)
30 June annually (DPT-3 return of deposits and outstanding unsecured loans or transactions)
30 May annually (LLP Annual Return for preceding financial year)

File MGT-14 within 30 days of special resolution for AOA amendment
File SH-7 within 30 days of ordinary resolution authorising increase in authorised capital
Complete transfer and update register within 2 months of date of instrument of transfer (SH-4)
As per MCA dematerialisation mandate; private companies must demat all shares within prescribed regulatory timeline
File LLP Form 24 (strike off) after settling all liabilities; complete within 90 days of partners' resolution
File STK-2 within 30 days of board resolution; voluntary winding up under Section 59, Insolvency & Bankruptcy Code
Within 180 days of date of incorporation (mandatory declaration of commencement of business via INC-20A)
As per MCA scheme notification; file within the scheme validity window (scheme dates vary per MCA circular)
Within 30 days of receipt of FDI; annual FC-GPR/FC-TRS return by 30 June
Within 30 days of making overseas investment; annual ODI/APR return by 30 June
15 July annually
